lines: The year is 1864. Dark spirits roam the crumbling streets of Edo.
You are a wanderer — blade for hire, curse-hunter by trade.
Word has reached you of an Oni War General terrorising the merchant districts.
You descend into the fog. The streets are quiet. Too quiet.
Find the Oni General. End the curse. Begin your legend.
The Oni War General falls at last.
Its horn crumbles to ash. The miasma lifts.
The streets of Edo breathe again — for now.
But you sense darker forces stirring at the city's edge.
Chapter 1 Complete. The road ahead grows longer.
Beyond Edo's walls lies the Kageyama Forest — ancient, silent, and cursed.
Villagers speak of silk-wrapped bodies hanging from blackened trees.
A spider demon, Jorogumo, weaves fate for any who enter.
The forest whispers your name. Something there knows you are coming.
Chapter 2 begins. Do not let the silk catch you.
Wanderer. You have passed the outer wards.
The Yokai grow stronger the deeper you go.
The Spider Queen's web spans the entire forest heart.
Bring flame. Bring poison. She is not immune to her own gifts.
A mortal dares enter my grove?
You smell of Oni blood. How amusing.
I will add you to my collection — preserved in silk, forever.
Let us see if your blade cuts web as well as it cuts shadow.
The Spider Queen's silk shroud unravels.
Her eight eyes dim. The forest holds its breath.
Webs dissolve like morning frost. The cursed fog retreats.
Villagers will sleep safely tonight.
Chapter 2 Complete. Darker gods stir in the deep mountains.
